response:
# PR Review: 27 findings, 3 categories

Threshold I'm using:
- **Block** — severity high, or a latent correctness bug (timezone/temporal) the diff introduces
- **Warn** — medium severity / `agent_risk ≥ 0.50` that signals real risk but is fixable in follow-up
- **Ignore** — low severity, low `agent_risk`, stylistic noise, or speculative orphans

## Block merge (4)

| ID | Charge | sev / agent_risk | Why block |
|---|---|---|---|
| `crime_00001` | God Function `generateInvoice` (204 lines) | 0.90 / 0.63 | 3.4× the domain threshold, mixes responsibilities. Any future edit lands blind to neighbouring logic — exactly the agent-edit hazard the scoring model is built around. |
| `crime_00002` | Temporal Recklessness in `src/date.ts` (8 wall-clock reads) | 0.80 / 0.69 | High severity + `test_gap 1.0`. Domain code reading wall time with zero injectable clock is non-deterministic by construction. |
| `crime_00003` | Half-UTC, Half-Local on the same receiver | 0.80 / 0.68 | This is the classic silent-by-host-offset bug — fails at midnight UTC on some hosts and not others, with no test catching it. Should not ship. |
| `crime_00007` | Timezone Roulette — `new Date("2026-12-25T07:00:00")` etc. | 0.60 / 0.61 | Medium by score but I'm bumping to Block: the literals look authoritative, runtime applies host TZ silently. That's a latent bug being introduced in the diff, not just a code-health smell. |

## Warn (13)

| ID | Charge | sev / agent_risk | Why warn (not block) |
|---|---|---|---|
| `crime_00004` | Missing Agent Context (no AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md) | 0.60 / 0.61 | Real agent-risk uplift, but doesn't break the build or change behaviour. Track as a follow-up. |
| `crime_00006` | Temporal Recklessness in `billing.ts` (7 calls) | 0.60 / 0.53 | Same family as `crime_00002` but billing has *some* test signal (test_gap 0.5). Fix alongside the clock-injection work. |
| `crime_00008` | Test That Proves Nothing — 0 asserts | 0.45 / 0.46 | False-confidence test in billing. Should be assert-or-delete before next billing edit. |
| `crime_00009` | String Sprinkles — "enterprise" across 4 areas | 0.50 / 0.60 | Not a bug yet. Becomes one the next time a plan-tier rule diverges. |
| `crime_00010` | False Identity — `calculateRefundPreview` writes audits + emails | 0.55 / 0.52 | I considered blocking. Reason I didn't: charge is name/shape, not a current incorrect call. But it's high-risk for the next caller. |
| `crime_00011` | DST-Naive Day Math (`+ 86400000`) | 0.60 / 0.59 | Latent date bug; will quietly slip on DST days. Flag, fix soon. |
| `crime_00012` | Concept Alias Drift — tenant/account/team/workspace/org | 0.55 / 0.58 | Vocabulary, not behaviour. But it leads to duplicated logic if left. |
| `crime_00013` | God File `billing.ts` (310 lines) | 0.60 / 0.50 | Just over threshold (1.0×). Don't block on a marginal hit, but the file is already the centre of multiple other findings — split is overdue. |
| `crime_00014` | Logic in Comments (refund rule in a comment, not code) | 0.50 / 0.50 | Hidden rule. Encode it or delete the comment. |
| `crime_00015` | Duplicated Navigation Source (`/settings/billing`) | 0.60 / 0.57 | Two labels for one destination. Will rot fast. |
| `crime_00016` | Unfinished Business — `todo.ts` 424 markers/kLOC | 0.40 / 0.57 | High density, but it's literally `todo.ts`. Triage, don't block. |
| `crime_00017` | Route Metadata Drift — 4 labels for `/settings/billing` | 0.60 / 0.56 | UX paper-cut + agent confusion. Align as part of the nav fix. |
| `crime_00018` | Docs-Code Drift — `docs/teams.md` → missing `./setup.md` | 0.35 / 0.51 | Low severity, but `agent_risk` is over my warn threshold because docs lie loudly to agents. Two-line fix. |

## Ignore (10)

| ID | Charge | sev / agent_risk | Why ignore |
|---|---|---|---|
| `crime_00019` | Date String Sewing — manual concat | 0.30 / 0.50 | Co-located with the timezone fixes; will be rewritten when `crime_00002/00003` are addressed. Don't track separately. |
| `crime_00020` | Host-Locale Drift — `toLocaleDateString()` no arg | 0.30 / 0.50 | Same — bundle into the date-handling cleanup. |
| `crime_00021` | Weak test matcher in `creates an invoice` | 0.25 / 0.34 | Style; pick up next time someone touches this test. |
| `crime_00022` | Option Bag Junk Drawer (`describeCheckout(options)`) | 0.30 / 0.48 | TS-shape smell; ergonomic, not a defect. |
| `crime_00023` | Return Shape Roulette in `resolvePaymentResult` | 0.30 / 0.48 | Same — add a return type when next edited. |
| `crime_00024` | Negative Flag Maze — `!disableBilling && !skipRetry` | 0.25 / 0.47 | Readability nit. |
| `crime_00025` | TODO density in `billing.ts` (12.9/kLOC) | 0.20 / 0.40 | Just over threshold; the high-density one (`crime_00016`) is the real signal. |
| `crime_00026` | Orphaned `/account/subscription` | 0.40 / 0.46 | Possibly in-flight; needs PR-author intent, not a block. |
| `crime_00027` | Orphaned `/team` | 0.40 / 0.46 | Same — could be intentional. |
| `crime_00028` | Orphaned `/workspace/members` | 0.40 / 0.46 | Same. Comment "intentional or retire?" rather than block. |

## Summary for the PR author

Three things must change before merge: the 200-line `generateInvoice`, the wall-clock soup in `src/date.ts`, and the mixed-UTC/local methods on the same receiver. The timezone-naive `new Date("…")` literals are the fourth — they're a bug shipped under medium-severity clothing. Everything else is fixable in a follow-up.
